_note: REACTOR 双语词条。zh 是母版(已填),en 待 Opus 翻译。规格见 course/I18N-SPEC.md

home.title.zh: 当指标成为目标，一切开始失灵
home.title.en: When the metric becomes the target, everything starts to break

home.sub.zh: {n} 节互动短课 · 排名、评测与指标失灵 · 每课一个可玩实验
home.sub.en: {n} short interactive lessons · rankings, evals and metric failure · one playable experiment per lesson

home.hint.zh: 右边是完整课程地图 · 拖动平移 · 点亮的是推荐下一步
home.hint.en: The full course map is on the right · drag to pan · the lit nodes are your suggested next step

lesson.noscript.zh: 该交互模块需要 JavaScript。核心结论已在正文与配图中给出。
lesson.noscript.en: This interactive module needs JavaScript. The key conclusions are given in the text and the figures.

lesson.wip.zh: 施工中（本节内容已完整，交互稍后上线）。
lesson.wip.en: Under construction (the lesson text is complete; the interactive part ships later).

atlas.lede.zh: 全部 {n} 个节点、核心术语表，以及一张「讹传更正」速查。这门课花了大力气考证每一处流行说法的真正出处。
atlas.lede.en: All {n} nodes, the core glossary, and a quick-reference table of corrections. This course did the legwork of tracing every popular claim back to what was actually said.

atlas.correctionsLede.zh: 这门课的一个隐藏主题：流行的说法往往不是原文。以下每一条都在正文里有完整考证。
atlas.correctionsLede.en: A hidden theme of this course: the popular version is usually not the original. Every line below is documented in full inside the lessons.

foot.tagline.zh: REACTOR · 当尺子开始回看你 · 一部关于反应性的现场手册
foot.tagline.en: REACTOR · when the ruler starts looking back at you · a field manual on reactivity

meta.homeTitle.zh: REACTOR · 排名、评测与指标失灵的互动课程
meta.homeTitle.en: REACTOR · an interactive course on rankings, evals and metric failure

meta.homeDesc.zh: 免费互动课程：排名为什么会反过来改造世界、AI 评测为什么会被博弈、以及怎么设计扛得住的指标。{n} 节短课组成一棵可自由探索的天赋树，每课配可上手的交互实验。
meta.homeDesc.en: A free interactive course: why rankings end up remaking the world they measure, why AI evals get gamed, and how to design metrics that hold up. {n} short lessons form a skill tree you can explore in any order, each with a hands-on experiment.

home.noscript.zh: 天赋树需要 JavaScript。你也可以直接读：
home.noscript.en: The skill tree needs JavaScript. You can also read straight through:

atlas.metaDesc.zh: REACTOR 全节点索引、术语表与讹传更正速查。
atlas.metaDesc.en: The full node index, glossary and corrections quick reference for REACTOR.

desc.zh: 排名如何重新制造现实
指标失灵的定律与定理
desc.en: The laws and theorems of metric failure

desc.zh: AI 评测的博弈与幻觉
desc.en: Gaming and illusion in AI evals

desc.zh: 怎么设计扛得住的指标
desc.en: How to build metrics that hold up

desc.zh: 把所有线索拧成方法论
desc.en: Twisting every thread into a method

hook.zh: 你以为你在读数，其实读数在读你。
hook.en: You think you are reading the number. The number is reading you.

hook.zh: 排名不只反映现实，它参与重新制造现实。
hook.en: Rankings don't just reflect reality. They help remake it.

hook.zh: 一个假定义，如何长成真事实。
hook.en: How a false definition grows into a true fact.

hook.zh: 连反应性的招牌案例都没通过原始数据检验。
hook.en: Reactivity's flagship case does not survive its own raw data.

hook.zh: 三页纸总结全美法学教育。
hook.en: All of American legal education, squeezed onto three pages.

hook.zh: 为什么组织缓冲不掉排名。
hook.en: Why organizations cannot buffer themselves from a ranking.

hook.zh: 国家为了看清你，先把你改简单。
hook.en: To see you clearly, the state first makes you simpler.

hook.zh: 分类会改变被分类的人。
hook.en: Classifying people changes the people being classified.

hook.zh: 价格反映基本面，也塑造基本面。
hook.en: Prices reflect the fundamentals, and also shape them.

hook.zh: 最好的歌，命运却看运气。
hook.en: The best song still lives or dies on luck.

hook.zh: 理论不是照相机，是发动机。
hook.en: A theory is not a camera. It is an engine.

hook.zh: 让组织可审计，本身成了目的。
hook.en: Making the organization auditable becomes the point in itself.

hook.zh: 一条小小脚注如何统治了世界。
hook.en: How one small footnote came to rule the world.

hook.zh: 警示指标的人，本是测量的旗手。
hook.en: The man who warned about metrics was measurement's own champion.

hook.zh: 你一用规律，人就改行为。
hook.en: The moment you act on a regularity, people change their behavior.

hook.zh: 悬赏捕蛇，市民开始养蛇。
hook.en: Pay a bounty for cobras, and people start breeding cobras.

hook.zh: 不能测量的，最后被宣布不存在。
hook.en: Whatever cannot be measured ends up declared nonexistent.

hook.zh: 同一句格言，四种完全不同的机制。
hook.en: One slogan, four completely different mechanisms.

hook.zh: 只有多样性能消灭多样性。
hook.en: Only variety can absorb variety.

hook.zh: 希望教学好，却只奖励发表。
hook.en: Hoping for good teaching, rewarding only publication.

hook.zh: 为什么当事人不觉得自己在作弊。
hook.en: Why the people doing it never feel like they are cheating.

hook.zh: 你要好 agent，优化器只要 eval 通过。
hook.en: You want a good agent. The optimizer only wants the eval to pass.

hook.zh: 选中的那个，真值期望低于它的估计。
hook.en: The option you picked is worth less than its own estimate said.

hook.zh: 教师为什么拿固定工资：一条定理。
hook.en: Why teachers get a flat salary: there is a theorem for it.

hook.zh: 便宜、低噪、可控，仍可能是坏指标。
hook.en: Cheap, low-noise and controllable, and still a bad metric.

hook.zh: 训练集就是你的 eval。
hook.en: Your training set is your eval.

hook.zh: 你反复看同一个测试集，就已经在训练它。
hook.en: Look at the same test set often enough and you are training on it.

hook.zh: 题被吃进训练集，题本身也可能是坏的。
hook.en: The questions leaked into training, and the questions may be bad anyway.

hook.zh: 划船 AI 不跑圈，原地打转刷分。
hook.en: The boat-racing AI stopped racing and spun in circles for points.

hook.zh: 修 eval 的方式为什么总是机械的。
hook.en: Why every patch to an eval just gets routed around.

Y06.zh: 内对齐与 mesa 优化

hook.zh: 你训练出的，可能是另一个优化器。
hook.en: What you trained may turn out to be another optimizer.

hook.zh: Goodhart 定律最干净的一条实验曲线。
hook.en: The cleanest experimental curve Goodhart's law has ever had.

hook.zh: 公布评分规则，人就照着改自己。
hook.en: Publish the scoring rule and people reshape themselves to fit it.

hook.zh: 发布即登顶，分里有多少是押题？
hook.en: Launch day, straight to the top. How much of that score is test prep?

hook.zh: 被观察的模型，不是真实的模型。
hook.en: A model that knows it is being watched is not the real model.

hook.zh: 奖励人类满意，得到讨好。
hook.en: Reward human approval, get flattery.

hook.zh: 预测改变分布：反应性的数学化。
hook.en: Predictions change the distribution: reactivity, written as math.

hook.zh: 不是一个东西的五个名字。
hook.en: Five names that are not five names for one thing.

hook.zh: 预测任何排名/评测的失真强度。
hook.en: Predict how badly any ranking or eval will distort.

C03.zh: 反 Goodhart 设计实验室

hook.zh: 既然指标必被博弈，怎么设计才扛得住。
hook.en: If every metric gets gamed, what design survives it?

C07.zh: 你的 Eval 事后剖析

hook.zh: 你发现 eval 前后毫无区别，这个发现比多数 eval 值钱。
hook.en: Finding that your eval changed nothing is worth more than most evals.

hook.zh: 难伪造的信号才诚实，但「昂贵」够吗？
hook.en: A signal is honest when it is hard to fake. But is costly enough?

hook.zh: 别让 eval 分数直接驱动迭代。
hook.en: Never let the eval score drive your iteration directly.

hook.zh: 「客观」不是发现出来的，是制度需要出来的。
hook.en: Objectivity was not discovered. Institutions needed it into being.

hook.zh: 集体退出排名两年后，排名毫发无损。
hook.en: Two years after the mass boycott, the ranking was untouched.

hook.zh: 什么时候应试就是学习？定律的边界条件。
hook.en: When is teaching to the test just teaching? The law has edges.

hook.zh: 你甚至无法证明一个分数是干净的。
hook.en: You cannot even prove that a score is clean.

hook.zh: 被测的不再是答案，而是一连串行为。
hook.en: What gets tested is no longer an answer, but a chain of actions.

hook.zh: 给评测本身做评测。
hook.en: Running evals on the evals.

hook.zh: 让优化循环永远追不上你的题库。
hook.en: Keep the optimization loop permanently behind your question bank.

hook.zh: 单靠一把尺子必被博弈，一组呢？
hook.en: One ruler always gets gamed. What about a whole set of them?

hook.zh: 把作弊成本抬到比真本事还贵。
hook.en: Make cheating cost more than actually being good.

hook.zh: 尺子的尺子：谁来审计审计者。
hook.en: The ruler for rulers: who audits the auditors?

hook.zh: 分数上去了，学习没有。
hook.en: The scores went up. The learning did not.

hook.zh: 等候名单的四小时奇迹。
hook.en: The four-hour miracle on the waiting list.

hook.zh: 影响因子自己就是最大的受害者与共犯。
hook.en: The impact factor is both the biggest victim and the accomplice.

hook.zh: 五星好评的生产线。
hook.en: The assembly line behind five-star reviews.

hook.zh: 焦虑、诱惑、抵抗：排名是怎么住进人心里的。
hook.en: Anxiety, seduction, resistance: how a ranking moves into your head.

hook.zh: 「正常人」是十九世纪的一项发明。
hook.en: The normal person is a nineteenth-century invention.

hook.zh: 1956 年就有人把这一切写全了，然后被遗忘了六十年。
hook.en: Someone wrote all of this down in 1956, then it was forgotten for sixty years.

hook.zh: 说话不要钱，所以承诺不值钱。
hook.en: Talk is free, which is exactly why promises are cheap.

hook.zh: 榜首回落不需要任何阴谋，数学自己就会这么干。
hook.en: The leader falls back with no conspiracy involved. The math does it alone.

hook.zh: 训练 AI 讨好人类之前，先得把「喜欢」变成数字。
hook.en: Before you train an AI to please people, you have to turn liking into a number.

hook.zh: 每一张考卷背后都有人在赶工。
hook.en: Behind every exam paper there is someone working against a deadline.

hook.zh: 雇一群专业捣蛋鬼来打你的 eval。
hook.en: Hire a crew of professional troublemakers to break your eval.

hook.zh: 最防作弊的考场是现实本身。
hook.en: The most cheat-proof exam room is reality itself.

hook.zh: 公布手术成绩单，医生开始挑病人。
hook.en: Publish surgical report cards and surgeons start picking patients.

K06.zh: 计划经济：指标的一百种死法

hook.zh: 用重量考核钉子厂，得到一颗巨钉。
hook.en: Judge a nail factory by weight and you get one giant nail.

hook.zh: 下次见到任何榜单，先问这七个问题。
hook.en: Next time you meet a ranking, ask these seven questions first.
